response:
Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, bringing the total number of dogs to 29. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog, increasing the total to 30. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, reducing the total to 24. 

[address] is a key location where Emily's rescue center is situated. [date] is the date when the puppies were received. [time] is when the stray dog was brought in. [number] is the number of dogs adopted on Saturday. [amount] is the number of dogs brought in on Friday. [quantity] is the number of dogs Emily currently has in her rescue center. [location] is the place where the stray dog was found. [event] is the event that occurred on Friday. [action] is the action taken on Saturday. [result] is the final number of dogs in the rescue center.
